entries.title: Ashscale Dragon
entries.short_description: A lava-adapted dragon with obsidian scales that glow red when angered.
entries.content:
The Ashscale Dragon is one of the most feared creatures in the Exploded universe. Its scales are composed of hardened volcanic glass, capable of withstanding direct hits from steel blades. When threatened, the dragon's body temperature rises, causing the scales to emit a dull red glow.

Ashscales are solitary hunters, preferring to ambush prey from volcanic vents. They can launch jets of superheated ash from their mouths, blinding and burning enemies before closing in for the kill.

entries.title: Vector Resonance
entries.short_description: A mathematical force manipulation spell that alters directional vectors of physical objects.
entries.content:
Vector Resonance is a Tier-3 spell from the Pinnacle of Reality's Arcane Mathematics discipline. The caster must mentally calculate a 3D vector matrix and then project it onto a target object, effectively overriding its natural momentum.

Common uses include redirecting arrows mid-flight, accelerating falling objects downward, or creating invisible barriers by reversing the vector of incoming projectiles. The spell requires intense concentration; a mistake in the matrix can cause the vector to invert, throwing the caster backward.

entries.title: The Sunken Library
entries.short_description: An ancient repository of dragon knowledge, now submerged beneath a magma lake.
entries.content:
Situated deep beneath the Caldera Ridge, the Sunken Library was once the greatest archive of dragon lore in the Exploded world. After the Great Eruption, it was flooded with molten rock, preserving thousands of scrolls in vitrified stone.

Few have dared to venture into its halls. The heat is unbearable even for fire-resistant creatures, and the library is guarded by constructs made of obsidian and bound fire elementals.

entries.title: Kaelen Voss
entries.short_description: A rogue Void Engineer who abandoned the Spire to experiment with forbidden resonance frequencies.
entries.content:
Kaelen Voss was once a promising student at the Spire of Harmonic Ascension. Obsessed with the unheard frequencies of the universe, he began manipulating Vector Resonance beyond approved limits, causing a cascade of dimensional tears.

Now hunted by the Keepers of the Spire, Voss operates from a hidden workshop on the floating island of Nethara. He seeks to break the fundamental laws of reality, believing that the Pinnacle is merely a cage.

entries.title: Emberfang Dagger
entries.short_description: A dagger forged from the tooth of an ancient Ashscale Dragon, still retaining a fraction of its fire.
entries.content:
The Emberfang Dagger is a rare relic from the Age of Embers. Its blade is made from a single Ashscale dragon tooth, which naturally radiates heat. The dagger is warm to the touch and can ignite flammable materials on contact.

Legend says that the dagger chooses its wielder; if the user is unworthy, the blade will burn their hand. It was last seen in the possession of a dragon hunter named Thorne Blackwood, who vanished in the Ash Wastes.
